patch.value: MCP pm_update --comment string crashes with 'values.map is not a function'

Calling pm_update via MCP with options.comment='some text' (string, not array) crashes with `values.map is not a function`. Likely the same root cause as the tags-as-CSV fix (pm-1jcw from session 10) - comment/note/learning fields expect arrays and the MCP normalizer doesn't promote scalars. Workaround: call via CLI `pm comments <id> <text>`.
MCP pm_update accepts string scalars for comment/note/learning and promotes them to arrays; new test covers the normalization.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Fixed in this session: src/mcp/server.ts normalizeOptionsArrays now promotes scalar strings to single-element arrays for comment/note/learning/reminder/event/dep/depRemove/file/doc/test/unset/add/remove/addGlob/migrate/envSet/envClear fields when the CLI expects arrays. The running MCP server uses the old build until restarted.
